home.tagline: FirstClass Immobilier, Licensed Real Estate Developer.
home.subTagline: Leader in its sectors of activity.
home.statement: With us, rest assured — real estate is done and lived differently.

about.title: About Us
about.bio: FirstClass Immobilier is a licensed real estate developer based in Abidjan. For over eight years we have supported individuals, companies, and investors in acquiring land, building homes, and developing premium subdivisions.
about.values: Integrity, excellence, innovation, client-first service. We build lasting relationships by placing transparency at the heart of every transaction.
about.vision: Become the go-to reference of real estate development in Côte d’Ivoire and the sub-region, through premium developments and neighborhoods that shape a better way of life.
about.mission: Democratize access to property ownership for the diaspora and Ivorian families by delivering reliable, secure projects on controlled timelines, with end-to-end support.
about.products: Serviced land, turn-key homes, apartments, complete subdivisions, ACD support, rental management.

realisations.title: Our Work
realisations.intro: Explore our delivered projects across Abidjan, Greater Abidjan, inland, and beyond.
